dataset.description: Configurable parameters to construct the dataset for a RT-DETR experiment.

eval_spatial_size.description: Input resolution to run evaluation during validation and testing. This is in the [h, w] order.
eval_spatial_size.title: evaluation spatial size

multi_scales.description: A list of sizes to perform random resize.
multi_scales.title: multi-scales

preserve_aspect_ratio.description: Flag to enable resize with preserving the aspect ratio.
preserve_aspect_ratio.title: preserve aspect ratio

train_spatial_size.description: Input resolution to run evaluation during training. This is in the [h, w] order.
train_spatial_size.title: train spatial size

batch_size.description: The batch size for training and validation
batch_size.title: batch size

dataset_type.description:
If set to default, we follow the standard CocoDetection` dataset structure
                    from the torchvision which loads COCO annotation in every subprocess. This leads to redudant
                    copy of data and can cause RAM to explod if workers` is high. If set to serialized,
                    the data is serialized through pickle and torch.Tensor` that allows the data to be shared
                    across subprocess. As a result, RAM usage can be greatly improved.
dataset_type.title: dataset type

eval_class_ids.description: IDs of the classes for evaluation.
eval_class_ids.title: eval class ids

infer_data_sources.description:
The data source for inference:
                    * image_dir : The list of directories that contains the inference images
                    * classmap : The path of the .txt file that contains class names
infer_data_sources.title: infer data sources

num_classes.description: The number of classes in the training data
num_classes.title: num classes

pin_memory.description:
Flag to enable the dataloader to allocated pagelocked memory for faster
                    of data between the CPU and GPU.
pin_memory.title: pin_memory

quant_calibration_data_sources.description:
The data source for quantization calibration:
                    * image_dir : The directory that contains the quantization calibration images
                    * json_file(optional) : The path of the JSON file, which uses quantization calibration-                        annotation COCO format
quant_calibration_data_sources.title: quantization calibration data sources

remap_mscoco_category.description:
Flag to enable mapping of MSCOCO 91 classes to 80. Only required if we're directly
                    training using the original COCO annotation files.
                    For custom dataset, this value needs to be set False
remap_mscoco_category.title: remap mscoco category

test_data_sources.description:
The data source for testing:
                    * image_dir : The directory that contains the test images
                    * json_file : The path of the JSON file, which uses test-annotation COCO format
test_data_sources.title: test data sources

train_data_sources.description:
The list of data sources for training:
                    * image_dir : The directory that contains the training images
                    * json_file : The path of the JSON file, which uses training-annotation COCO format
train_data_sources.title: train data sources

val_data_sources.description:
The list of data sources for validation:
                    * image_dir : The directory that contains the validation images
                    * json_file : The path of the JSON file, which uses validation-annotation COCO format
val_data_sources.title: validation data sources

workers.description: The number of parallel workers processing data
workers.title: batch size

distill.description: Configurable parameters to construct the distiller for a RT-DETR experiment.

inference.description: Configurable parameters to construct the inferencer for a RT-DETR experiment.

batch_size.description: The batch size of the input Tensor. This is important if batch_size > 1 for large dataset.
batch_size.title: batch size

checkpoint.description: Path to the checkpoint used for inference.
checkpoint.title: Checkpoint path

color_map.description: Class-wise dictionary with colors to render boxes.
color_map.title: color map

conf_threshold.description:
The value of the confidence threshold to be used when
                    filtering out the final list of boxes.
conf_threshold.title: confidence threshold

gpu_ids.description:
List of GPU IDs to run the inference on. The length of this list
        must be equal to the number of gpus in inference.num_gpus.
gpu_ids.title: GPU IDs

input_height.description: Height of the input image tensor.
input_height.title: input height

input_width.description: Width of the input image tensor.
input_width.title: input width

is_internal.description: Flag to render with internal directory structure.
is_internal.title: is internal

is_quantized.description: Flag to indicate if the model is quantized
is_quantized.title: Flag to indicate if the model is quantized

num_gpus.description: The number of GPUs to run the inference job.
num_gpus.title: Number of GPUs

num_nodes.description: Number of nodes to run the inference on. If > 1, then multi-node is enabled.
num_nodes.title: Number of nodes

outline_width.description: Width in pixels of the bounding box outline.
outline_width.title: outline width

results_dir.description: Path to where all the assets generated from a task are stored.
results_dir.title: Results directory

trt_engine.description:
Path to the TensorRT engine to be used for inference.
                    This only works with :code:`tao-deploy`.
trt_engine.title: TensorRT Engine

model.description: Configurable parameters to construct the model for a RT-DETR experiment.

act.description: The activation used for top-down FPN and bottom-up PAN.
act.title: activation

alpha.description: The alpha value in the varifocal loss.
alpha.title: alpha

aux_loss.description:
A flag specifying whether to use auxiliary
                    decoding losses (loss at each decoder layer)
aux_loss.title: Auxiliary Loss

backbone.description:
The backbone name of the model.
                    TAO implementation of RT-DETR support ResNet, EfficientViT, FAN, and ConvNext.
backbone.title: backbone

backbone_names.description: Prefix of the tensor names corresponding to the backbone.
backbone_names.title: Backbone tensor name prefix

bbox_cost.description: The relative weight of the L1 error of the bounding box coordinates in the matching cost.
bbox_cost.title: BBox cost coefficient

bbox_loss_coef.description: The relative weight of the L1 error of the bounding box coordinates in the loss function.
bbox_loss_coef.title: BBox loss coefficient

class_cost.description: The relative weight of the classification error in the matching cost.
class_cost.title: Class cost coefficient

dec_layers.description: Numer of decoder layers in the transformer
dec_layers.title: decoder layers

depth_mult.description: The number of RegVGGBlock used in CSPRepLayer.
depth_mult.title: expansion

distillation_loss_coef.description: The coefficient for the distillation loss during distill.
distillation_loss_coef.title: distillation loss coefficient

dropout_ratio.description: The probability to drop hidden units.
dropout_ratio.title: drop out ratio

enc_act.description: The activation used for the encoder.
enc_act.title: encoder activation

enc_layers.description: Numer of encoder layers in the transformer
enc_layers.title: encoder layers

eval_idx.description: The index of decoder layer to use for evaluation. By default, use the last decoder layer.
eval_idx.title: evaluation index

expansion.description: The expansion raito for hidden dimesnion used in CSPRepLayer.
expansion.title: expansion

feat_channels.description: The feature channel sizes in decoder.
feat_channels.title: feature channels

feat_strides.description: The stride used as grid size of positional embedding at each encoder layer.
feat_strides.title: feature strides

frozen_fm.description: Configurable parameters to construct the frozen foundation model.

backbone.description: Name of the frozen foundation model.
backbone.title: Name of the frozen foundation model

checkpoint.description: Path to a pretrained foundation model.
checkpoint.title: Pretrained foundation model path or name

enabled.description: Flag to enable frozen foundation model to be added to RT-DETR.
enabled.title: Enable frozen FM

gamma.description: The gamma value in the varifocal loss.
gamma.title: gamma

giou_cost.description: The relative weight of the GIoU loss of the bounding box in the matching cost.
giou_cost.title: GIoU cost coefficient

giou_loss_coef.description: The relative weight of the GIoU loss of the bounding box in the loss function.
giou_loss_coef.title: GIoU loss coefficient

load_teacher_enc_dec.description: Flag to load teacher's encoder and decoder weights.
load_teacher_enc_dec.title: Load teacher's encoder and decoder weights

loss_types.description: Losses to be used during training
loss_types.title: loss_types

num_feature_levels.description: The number of feature levels to use in the model
num_feature_levels.title: number of feature levels

num_select.description: The number of top-K predictions selected during post-process. Must be < num_queries * num_classes
num_select.title: num select

pe_temperature.description: The temperature applied to the positional sine embedding.
pe_temperature.title: pe_temperature

pretrained_backbone_path.description: [Optional] Path to a pretrained backbone file.
pretrained_backbone_path.title: pretrained backbone path

return_interm_indices.description: The index of feature levels to use in the model. The length must match `num_feature_levels`.
return_interm_indices.title: return interim indices

train_backbone.description:
Flag to set backbone weights as trainable or frozen.
                    When set to `False`, the backbone weights will be frozen.
train_backbone.title: Train backbone

use_encoder_idx.description: The index of multi-scale backbone features to pass to encoder.
use_encoder_idx.title: use encoder index

vfl_loss_coef.description: The relative weight of the varifocal error in the loss function.
vfl_loss_coef.title: varifocal loss coefficient

model_name.description: Name of model if invoking task via :code:`model_agnostic`
model_name.title: Model name

quantize.description: Configurable parameters to run model quantization for a RT-DETR experiment.

algorithm.description: Calibration/optimization algorithm. Used by ModelOpt backends (modelopt.pytorch and modelopt.onnx). Ignored by torchao backend.
algorithm.title: Calibration algorithm

backend_kwargs.description: Additional keyword arguments to pass to the backend
backend_kwargs.title: Backend kwargs

device.description: Device to use for calibration. Accepts 'cuda' (uses default GPU), 'cpu', 'trt' (TensorRT for ONNX backend), or specific GPU device like 'cuda:0', 'cuda:1', etc. If 'cuda' is specified but no GPU is available, the framework will automatically fall back to 'cpu'. Note: 'trt' is only supported by the modelopt.onnx backend for ONNX Runtime with TensorRT execution provider.
device.title: Calibration device

layers.description: List of per-module quantization configurations. Each entry specifies which modules to quantize and their data types. This is the primary way to configure quantization.
layers.title: Layer quantization configs

model_path.description: Path to the model to be quantized. For ONNX backend, path to ONNX file.
model_path.title: Model path

results_dir.description: Path to where all the assets generated from a task are stored.
results_dir.title: Results directory

skip_names.description: List of module/layer names or patterns to exclude from quantization
skip_names.title: Skip names

results_dir.description: Path to where all the assets generated from a task are stored.
results_dir.title: Results directory

train.description: Configurable parameters to construct the trainer for a RT-DETR experiment.

activation_checkpoint.description:
A True value instructs train to recompute in backward pass to save GPU memory,
        rather than storing activations.
activation_checkpoint.title: enable activation checkpointing

checkpoint_interval.description: The interval (in epochs) at which a checkpoint will be saved. Helps resume training.
checkpoint_interval.title: Checkpoint interval

checkpoint_interval_unit.description: The unit of the checkpoint interval.
checkpoint_interval_unit.title: Checkpoint interval unit

clip_grad_norm.description:
Amount to clip the gradient by L2 Norm.
        A value of 0.0 specifies no clipping.
clip_grad_norm.title: clip gradient norm

distributed_strategy.description:
The multi-GPU training strategy.
        DDP (Distributed Data Parallel) and Fully Sharded DDP are supported.
distributed_strategy.title: distributed_strategy

ema.description: Hyper parameters to configure the Exponential Moving Average.

cpu_offload.description: Offload EMA calculation to CPU. Note that this will significantly slow down training.
cpu_offload.title: cpu offload

decay.description: The decreasing factor for the exponential moving average.
decay.title: ema decay

every_n_steps.description: The number of steps to perform exponential moving average.
every_n_steps.title: every_n_steps

validate_original_weights.description: Whether to run evaluation using the non-EMA weight.
validate_original_weights.title: validate original weights

ema.title: ema

enable_ema.description: Whether to enable Exponential Moving Average during training.
enable_ema.title: enable ema

freeze.description:
List of layer names to freeze.
        Example: ["backbone", "encoder", "decoder"].
freeze.title: freeze

gpu_ids.description:
List of GPU IDs to run the training on. The length of this list
        must be equal to the number of gpus in train.num_gpus.
gpu_ids.title: GPU IDs

is_dry_run.description:
Whether to run the trainer in Dry Run mode. This serves
        as a good means to validate the spec file and run a sanity check on the trainer
        without actually initializing and running the trainer.
is_dry_run.title: Is dry run

num_epochs.description: Number of epochs to run the training.
num_epochs.title: Number of epochs

num_gpus.description: The number of GPUs to run the train job.
num_gpus.title: Number of GPUs

num_nodes.description: Number of nodes to run the training on. If > 1, then multi-node is enabled.
num_nodes.title: Number of nodes

optim.description: Hyper parameters to configure the optimizer.

lr.description: The initial learning rate for training the model, excluding the backbone.
lr.title: learning rate

lr_backbone.description: The initial learning rate for training the backbone.
lr_backbone.title: learning rate - backbone

lr_decay.description: The decreasing factor for the learning rate scheduler.
lr_decay.title: learning rate decay

lr_scheduler.description:
The learning scheduler:
                    * MultiStep : Decrease the lr by lr_decay from lr_steps
                    * StepLR : Decrease the lr by lr_decay at every lr_step_size.
lr_scheduler.title: learning rate scheduler

lr_step_size.description: The number of steps to decrease the learning rate in the StepLR.
lr_step_size.title: learning rate step size

lr_steps.description:
The steps at which the learning rate must be decreased.
                    This is applicable only with the MultiStep LR.
lr_steps.title: learning rate decay steps

momentum.description: The momentum for the AdamW optimizer.
momentum.title: momentum - AdamW

monitor_name.description: The metric value to be monitored for the :code:`AutoReduce` Scheduler.
monitor_name.title: monitor_name

optimizer.description: Type of optimizer used to train the network.

warmup_steps.description: The number of steps to perform linear learning rate warm-up.
warmup_steps.title: warm up steps

optim.title: optimizer

precision.description: Precision to run the training on.
precision.title: precision

pretrained_model_path.description: Path to a pre-trained RT-DETR model to initialize the current training from.

results_dir.description: Path to where all the assets generated from a task are stored.
results_dir.title: Results directory

resume_training_checkpoint_path.description: Path to the checkpoint to resume training from.
resume_training_checkpoint_path.title: Resume checkpoint path

seed.description: The seed for the initializer in PyTorch. If < 0, disable fixed seed.
seed.title: Seed for randomization

validation_interval.description:
The interval (in epochs) at which a evaluation
        will be triggered on the validation dataset.
validation_interval.title: Validation interval
